recommendations: CRITICAL: Channel SEO health is very low. Run seo_optimizer.py --apply immediately to update the 20 worst-performing videos.
216 videos (44%) score below 40. These need immediate title and description rewrites — they are invisible in search.
Add timestamps (chapters) to every video description — YouTube promotes videos with chapters in search results.
Ensure the first tag in every video is the primary niche keyword (e.g. 'artificial intelligence' for tech_ai). This is the single highest-value tag signal.
Target titles of 50-65 characters. Titles under 40 chars miss keyword density; over 70 chars get truncated in search results.
Add affiliate links (matrixmonster-20 tag) to all video descriptions. Even low-view videos can generate passive Amazon revenue over time.
Upload new videos consistently at optimal times: tech_ai at 17:00 UTC weekdays, finance at 13:00 UTC, motivation at 12:00 UTC.
